calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Petition To Invade
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Allen for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. James stated that the Family was using a seven year old van that was in constant need of repair, that Paul was close to 30 years of age, severely disabled and in a wheelchair, that if the costs were more than $46,678.00 that the Family would have to find another way to come up with the additional funds and that it costs $16,000.00 to $17,000.00 for conversion of the van. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Petition To Invade
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
Petition For Order To Invade Principal
